title: Gaimon Guards the Island of Rare Animals
description: On pages 7–9, Luffy, Zoro, and Nami reach a strange island where Gaimon and the rare animals guard a lonely mystery.
scene: The crew’s lighthearted exploration turns into a small fable about treasure, isolation, and the life Gaimon built after being trapped on the island.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Listen well, don't take a step further to the forest!

dialogue.speaker: Gaimon
dialogue.text: Or else you will face... the forest judgement!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Hey, the brat with the straw- hat, what did you just say?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Looks like the voice is coming from there!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Hey! I told you not to come closer!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: What a shock! That was a bullet, right?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Yea, but that surprised me too!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: kind of a thing are you?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: The bullet was fired from there!

summary: This part works as a pause between major arcs, showing that the sea contains strange lives and unusual dreams beyond simple battles.
